title: High Vol & Absentee Dry Cleaners /w Property in Dallas Uptown
description:
For Sale: Established Dry Cleaners with Prime Real Estate

Take advantage of a unique opportunity to own a successful dry cleaning business, perfectly situated on a heavily trafficked road with exceptional visibility. This well-established operation has been serving the community for years, boasting a loyal customer base and a reputation for quality service.

Key Features:

Prime Location: Located on a busy thoroughfare, this property offers high visibility and easy access, ensuring a steady flow of potential customers.
Real Estate Included: This sale includes the property, providing long-term stability and the potential for expansion or diversification.
No Advertising Needed: The business thrives on word-of-mouth and repeat clientele, indicating a strong brand presence with room for growth through marketing.
Fully Equipped: The facility comes with all necessary equipment in excellent condition, ready for a new owner to step in and continue operations seamlessly.
Potential for Growth: With the right marketing strategy, there's significant potential to increase revenue through expanded services or extended hours.
Don’t miss this rare chance to acquire a profitable dry cleaning business in a prime location. Whether you’re looking to invest in a thriving industry or expand your portfolio, this is an opportunity not to be overlooked! Contact us today for more details and to schedule a viewing.

Ad#:2289440
